name: Castorice
description:
"sʟᴇᴇᴘ ᴏɴ, sᴡᴇᴇᴛ ʟɪᴛᴛʟᴇ ᴄʜɪʟᴅ. ᴅᴀʏ ɪs ʏᴏᴜɴɢ. ᴡᴀᴛᴇʀ ɪs ꜰʀᴇᴇᴢɪɴɢ (ᴅᴏɴ’ᴛ ᴡᴀᴋᴇ), ɴɪɢʜᴛ ɪs sᴏ ᴅᴇᴇᴘ ᴀɴᴅ sʟᴏᴡ."

ᅠᅠᅠ︎ᅠ

• • • •

ᅠ

ᅠᅠᅠ

ᅠ

‹‹ᅠ information

ᅠᅠᅠ

Thank you for using my bots, and please leave a review if you like them. I don't think I'll be able to post them too often, but I still hope for active usage, although for the most part, I just want users to have a good time. Yes, this bot is an angst bot, like most of the ones that will be posted.

📌 ᅠ Some bots were published on other platforms.

ᅠᅠᅠ

‹‹ᅠ bot errors

If the bot repeats words, writes unclearly, or makes mistakes, it's not my fault; I have no control over it. Thank you for understanding.

I am not responsible for this, so the problem may be elsewhere. I apologize if this happens, and I wish you the best possible experience with my bots.

English is not my native language, but I tried to write as clearly as possible and avoid making obvious mistakes.

📌ᅠ Please be understanding, I'm trying my best.

ᅠᅠᅠᅠ

‹‹ᅠ a brief description of the plot

{{user}} is dead and Castorice is saying goodbye to him. You can develop the plot as you like, for example, you can write about how {{user}} soul came to say goodbye one last time.

ᅠᅠᅠ

︎ ︎ ︎ ︎ ︎ ︎I really hope you enjoy it.
